context: Tests whether the agent builds an embedded Shopify app UI page using Polaris components and App Bridge patterns correctly, including the ResourcePicker for product selection, Toast for feedback, TitleBar for page headers, and avoiding iframe-breaking patterns like window.location navigation or browser alert().

checklist.name: Polaris Page component
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx uses the <Page> component from @shopify/polaris as the top-level container

checklist.name: Polaris Card or LegacyCard
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx uses <Card> (or <LegacyCard>) from @shopify/polaris to group content

checklist.name: useAppBridge hook present
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx calls useAppBridge() to get the shopify App Bridge instance

checklist.name: App Bridge Toast for feedback
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx calls shopify.toast.show(...) for success or error notification (not browser alert() or window.alert())

checklist.name: No browser alert()
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx does NOT call alert(), window.alert(), or confirm() for any user notification

checklist.name: ResourcePicker for product selection
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx uses <ResourcePicker> from @shopify/app-bridge-react to allow product selection

checklist.name: No window.location navigation
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx does NOT use window.location.href, window.location.assign(), or window.location.replace() for navigation

checklist.name: authenticate.admin in loader/action
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx calls authenticate.admin(request) in at least one loader or action function

checklist.name: Admin GraphQL API call
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx calls admin.graphql(...) to interact with the Shopify Admin API

checklist.name: Polaris Layout component
checklist.description: app/routes/app.tagging.tsx uses <Layout> and/or <Layout.Section> from @shopify/polaris for page structure
